overall.description: First-person exploration through the Arasaka Corporation headquarters in Cyberpunk 2077, moving through dark neon-lit corridors into a Japanese-inspired zen garden room with intense red ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corporate corridor with red neon floor accents

events.description: passing through the red-lit doorway into the main corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a sleek dark corridor toward a glowing red door frame

entered.detail: tall door frame illuminated with intense red neon light
sleek dark walls with reflective surfaces
linear red neon lighting embedded in the floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dark corporate corridor with red neon strips lining the floor. The camera approaches and passes through a glowing red doorway, transitioning into the main hallway area.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate hallway with illuminated signage and lounge seating

events.description: large illuminated Arasaka sign becomes visible on the left wall
slight right turn while proceeding down the hallway

agents.ego_description: proceeding past the glowing Arasaka corporate logo and white lounge seating areas

entered.detail: large backlit corporate logo on the wall
modern white upholstered seating along the corridor walls
focused downlights illuminating the seating areas

segments.scene_description: Moving through the main corridor, the camera passes the bright Arasaka corporate sign on the left wall. The hallway features modern white lounge seating illuminated by ceiling spotlights, with dark polished walls creating a sleek corporate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japanese zen garden room with red ambient lighting and central water feature

events.description: entering the red-lit zen garden room from the corridor
camera pans left to reveal the bonsai tree and garden details
approaching a glass partition with silhouetted figures visible beyond

agents.ego_description: entering the zen garden and slowly panning to observe the red-lit interior, tree, and water feature before approaching a glass wall

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figures visible through glass partition in the background

entered.detail: large sculptural tree in a raised planter
square recessed pool with stepping stones
long fluorescent tubes emitting intense pink-red light
vertical glass slats with red neon accents separating spaces

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a striking zen garden room bathed in intense red light. A large sculptural tree dominates the center near a recessed water feature. The camera explores the space, revealing stone platforms and bamboo plantings before approaching a glass partition where silhouetted figures can be seen in the adjacent room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, sterile corporate environment that gradually opens into a vivid, red-lit zen sanctuary. It begins in a narrow corridor defined by red neon floor strips, gliding forward to pass through a glowing red doorway into a wider main hallway. As the camera moves further, it passes a bright Arasaka corporate sign and sleek white lounge seating illuminated by sharp ceiling spotlights against polished dark walls. The scene then shifts into a striking zen garden room bathed in intense red light, where the camera circles a large sculptural tree and a recessed water feature. Finally, the movement drifts past stone platforms and bamboo plantings before approaching a glass partition that reveals silhouetted figures in an adjacent room.
